zh.lifeSummary: Richard Leete於1398年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾。他於1423年之前與Maria Slade結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1423年在他的家鄉享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Leete was born in 1398, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Maria Slade before 1423. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1423, in his hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Leete est né en 1398, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Maria Slade avant 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1423, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Leete wurde 1398 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat vor 1423 Maria Slade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1423 im Alter von 25 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Leete è nato il nel 1398 nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Maria Slade prima del 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1423, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Leeteは1398年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた。1423年以前にMaria Sladeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1423年に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Leete(은)는 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1423년 이전 Maria Slade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1423년 그의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Leete nasceu em 1398, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Maria Slade antes 1423. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1423, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Leete родился в 1398 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Slade перед 1423 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1423 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Leete nació en 1398, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Maria Slade antes de 1423. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1423, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.
